features.description: /commit-push-pr auto-allows git push to remote.pushDefault or the sole configured remote, in addition to origin.
features.reference_changelog_line: `/commit-push-pr` now auto-allows `git push` to the repo's configured push remote (`remote.pushDefault`, or the sole remote when only one is configured) in addition to `origin`

features.description: EnterWorktree now prompts for confirmation before entering a worktree outside .claude/worktrees/.
features.reference_changelog_line: `EnterWorktree` now asks for confirmation before entering a git worktree outside the project's `.claude/worktrees/` directory

features.description: Per-server request_timeout_ms in --mcp-config and .mcp.json is now honored instead of defaulting to 60s.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed MCP servers configured via `--mcp-config` or `.mcp.json` ignoring a per-server `request_timeout_ms`, which caused long-running MCP tool calls to time out at the 60s default in fresh sessions

features.description: CLAUDE_CODE_EXTRA_BODY now propagates from the dispatching session to claude agents and --bg background workers.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `CLAUDE_CODE_EXTRA_BODY` being silently ignored by `claude agents` / `--bg` background workers; the shell-exported override now follows the dispatching session

features.description: --permission-prompt-tool pointing at an MCP server no longer crashes with 'MCP tool not found' on cold start.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `--permission-prompt-tool` pointing at an MCP server crashing with "MCP tool not found" on cold start before the server finishes connecting

features.description: claude rm now removes the job from the daemon roster so it no longer reappears in claude agents.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `claude rm` leaving the removed job in the daemon roster, causing the row to reappear in `claude agents`

features.description: /cd now offers directory path suggestions, matching /add-dir behavior.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added directory path suggestions to `/cd`, matching `/add-dir` behavior

features.description: /doctor gains a check proposing to trim checked-in CLAUDE.md content that Claude could derive from the codebase.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added a `/doctor` check that proposes trimming checked-in `CLAUDE.md` files by cutting content Claude could derive from the codebase
